default.summary: Access to ports, pipelines, and major roads varies by site. Check distance to export corridors, industrial hubs, and hydrogen pipelines.

CA.summary: Major ports (LA/Long Beach, Oakland); rail and I-5/I-10 corridors. H2 pipeline build-out in planning. Industrial zones along coast and Central Valley.

TX.summary: Gulf Coast ports (Houston, Corpus Christi); dense pipeline and petrochemical corridor. Rail and highway network. Strong H2 and ammonia export potential.

NM.summary: Rail and I-25/I-40; proximity to Permian and Colorado hubs. Pipeline and export corridor development growing.

AZ.summary: I-10/I-8 corridors; rail to California and Mexico. Solar and industrial development along transport routes.

NV.summary: I-80 and rail corridors; connections to California and Utah. Industrial and logistics development.

WA.summary: Puget Sound ports; rail to Midwest. Industrial and clean-energy infrastructure along I-5 and Columbia.

OR.summary: Port of Portland; I-5 and rail. Columbia River industrial corridor.

WY.summary: Rail and I-80; wind and industrial corridors. Pipeline and export routes to regional hubs.

UT.summary: I-15/I-80; rail to West Coast and Denver. Industrial and refining corridor.

CO.summary: I-25/I-70; rail to Front Range and Plains. Growing H2 and industrial infrastructure.

IA.summary: Rail hub; major highways. Ag and industrial logistics; ammonia and H2 corridor interest.

OK.summary: Pipeline and rail network; I-35/I-40. Cushing and Gulf connections. Strong energy logistics.

KS.summary: Rail and I-70; pipeline corridors. Central location for ag and energy logistics.

IL.summary: Chicago rail hub; Great Lakes and Mississippi access. Dense transport and industrial infrastructure.

NY.summary: Port of NY/NJ; rail and I-90/I-87. Industrial corridors and Northeast logistics.

PA.summary: Rail and I-76/I-80; Ohio River and East Coast connections. Industrial and pipeline infrastructure.

OH.summary: Rail and highway hub; Great Lakes and Ohio River. Manufacturing and industrial logistics.

FL.summary: Gulf and Atlantic ports; I-95/I-75. Industrial and space coast logistics.

LA.summary: Gulf Coast ports (New Orleans, Baton Rouge); major pipeline and petrochemical corridor. Barge, rail, and highway access.

ND.summary: Rail and pipeline; wind and ag logistics. Connections to Midwest and Canada.

NE.summary: I-80 and rail; central corridor. Ag and industrial logistics.

MT.summary: Rail corridors; I-90/I-15. Resource and ag logistics; regional hub potential.
